nasb.text: Now David became aware that Saul had come out to seek his life while David was in the wilderness of Ziph at Horesh.

esv.text: David saw that Saul had come out to seek his life. David was in the wilderness of Ziph at Horesh.

cnv.text: 大衛懼怕，因為掃羅出來尋索他的命。那時大衛住在西弗曠野的何列斯那裡。

ccb.text: 大卫在西弗旷野的何利沙得知扫罗要来杀他。
